Description: Full-service Kenworth heavy and medium duty truck dealership open 24/7 near I-40 Exit 398 (Strawberry Plains Pike) on Knoxville's east side. PACCAR, Cummins and CAT engine service, transmission, electrical, suspension, DPF cleaning, all-makes parts, body shop, and truck sales and rental.

Business Name: Newport Truck and Trailer Repair & Heavy Duty Towing
Description: Fixed-location heavy duty truck and trailer repair shop and towing operation in Newport just off I-40. Chassis, engine and transmission repair, electrical diagnostics, tire service and mounting, welding and fabrication; shop hours Mon-Fri 8am-5pm with 24-hour emergency dispatch. Also offers dedicated fleet truck parking on site.

Business Name: Newport Truck and Trailer Repair - Fleet Truck Parking
Description: Approximately 100 dedicated truck parking spots for fleet trucks at the Newport Truck and Trailer Repair yard in Newport near I-40, with overnight parking available and local motels and restaurants nearby. Contact the shop to arrange parking.

Business Name: Tennessee Welcome Center - Hartford / Cocke County (I-40 Westbound)
Description: State of Tennessee welcome center on I-40 westbound at mile marker 446 in Cocke County, the first stop entering Tennessee from North Carolina. Open 24/7 with separate truck parking, restrooms, vending, picnic and pet areas, and travel information staff. Posted 2-hour parking limit - not for overnight parking.

Business Name: I-40 Cumberland County Rest Area (Eastbound, MM 324.4)
Description: TDOT rest area on I-40 eastbound at mile marker 324.4 near Crossville with separate truck and car parking, restrooms, vending, picnic and pet areas; 2-hour parking limit. HELD: no civic street address available and official tn.gov/TDOT page could not be reached to verify (site blocked network access); unofficial sources only.

Business Name: I-40 Cumberland County Rest Area (Westbound, MM 326.6)
Description: TDOT rest area on I-40 westbound at mile marker 326.6 near Crossville with separate truck and car parking, restrooms, water, and picnic tables. HELD: no civic street address available and official tn.gov/TDOT source could not be reached to verify (site blocked network access); unofficial sources only.

Business Name: I-40 Weigh/Inspection Station - Cocke County (near NC line)
Description: Reported THP commercial vehicle inspection station on I-40 in Cocke County near the North Carolina state line (Hartford/Waterville area). HELD: the official THP Commercial Vehicle Scale Complexes page (tn.gov) could not be reached from this environment to confirm existence, direction, mile marker, or civic address. Only the Knox County I-40/I-75 MM 372 complex could be confirmed from official-source snippets, and that facility is already listed under I-75 coverage. Needs manual verification against tn.gov before publishing.

Small independent fuel stop at I-40 Exit 447 (Hartford Rd) with 4 fuel lanes, about 5 truck parking spaces, deli, and convenience store; open roughly 6am-9pm. HELD: only one substantive directory source (truckstopsandservices) with dated information; current branding and operating status could not be independently confirmed.

Truck tire and service bays at Love's Travel Stop #306, I-40 Exit 412. HELD: conflicting status - Love's location page still advertises 3 truck service bays and tire repair, but Find Truck Service lists the service and repair operation at this store as closed. Call to confirm before publishing as a standalone tire shop.

Newport motel near I-40 exits 432/435 that appears on hotel-truck-parking aggregator lists (along with Quality Inn, Motel 6 and Econo Lodge Newport). HELD: only a single aggregator source (hoteltruckparking.com) suggests truck/trailer parking; no explicit confirmation of semi truck parking from the hotel itself or a second independent source, and street address was not verified.

Tanker/tank interior wash facility at the Highway Transport chemical terminal off I-40 in west Knoxville. HELD: single directory source (findtruckservice/allstays truck wash list); unclear whether the wash rack serves outside carriers or only company equipment, and the location may fall inside the already-covered west Knoxville corridor.

24-hour QuikTrip travel center at I-40 Exit 14 (Whitten Rd) in Memphis, opened April 2025 with six truck diesel bays, bulk DEF, certified truck scales, and a full-service QT Kitchens. Built as a travel-center format store to serve commercial truck traffic on I-40.
Independent 24-hour travel center (formerly listed as Lakeland 66) about 0.1 mile from I-40 Exit 20 (Canada Rd) in Lakeland, with diesel, a convenience store, restrooms, ATM, and truck parking.
Budget motel directly off I-40 Exit 12 (Sycamore View Rd) in northeast Memphis that explicitly advertises on-site truck parking for guests with large vehicles. Rooms include free Wi-Fi.

Business Name: Tennessee Welcome Center - Memphis (I-40 Riverside Dr)
Description: Official TDOT state welcome center at I-40 mile marker 0.3, Exit 1 (Riverside Dr) in downtown Memphis, with dedicated car, RV, and truck parking spaces, restrooms, and vending. Parking is limited to two hours and overnight parking is not allowed.

Full-service Kenworth dealership and heavy-duty truck repair shop at I-40 Exit 213 (Spence Ln) on Nashville's east side. Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week with service for all makes including PACCAR, Cummins and CAT engines, FastLane express service, body shop, parts and 24-hour on-call support. Fixed-location shop.

Peterbilt commercial truck dealership with fixed-location service and parts at Fesslers Lane, I-40 Exit 212, just east of downtown Nashville. Commercial truck repair for heavy- and medium-duty trucks.

International Truck dealership with fixed-location diesel service, parts and body work in the Massman Dr/Elm Hill industrial corridor alongside I-40 between Briley Pkwy (Exit 215) and Donelson Pike, near Nashville International Airport. Service open Mon-Fri 7am-midnight, Sat 7am-3:30pm. Service line (615) 829-7900.

Commercial truck tire and alignment shop at Fesslers Lane, I-40 Exit 212, in operation since 1990. New, used and recap tires for semi trucks and trailers, box trucks, dump trucks and tow trucks, plus rotations, balancing and alignments at the fixed shop location.

Budget motel directly off I-40 at Exit 219 (Stewarts Ferry Pike) near Nashville International Airport. Truck parking is offered on site per multiple hotel-booking listings, with free WiFi, free parking and guest laundry.

Gated, fenced outdoor truck and oversized-vehicle parking facility near I-40 and TN-255 (Donelson Pike) close to Percy Priest Lake, serving Donelson, Hermitage and East Nashville. Monthly uncovered truck parking from about $169 with 24-hour gate access, HD cameras, oversized spots and wide driveways; also listed on Trucker Path for bobtail and box truck parking. Reservations via the RecNation app.

Business Name: Elite Trailer Sales & Service (Elite Truck and Tank Wash)
Description: Truck, trailer and tank wash with trailer sales/service in West Nashville. HELD: business is well-sourced (own site, Tank Wash Directory, Find Truck Service) but sits in the Centennial Blvd industrial area several miles from I-40; no source ties it to a specific I-40 exit 196-221, so exit placement is unverified.

Business Name: Days Inn by Wyndham Airport Nashville East
Description: Hotel located at I-40 Exit 219 (Percy Priest Dr/Stewarts Ferry Pike). HELD: location at Exit 219 is well documented, but no source found that explicitly confirms truck/large-vehicle parking, which is required for the hotels-truck-parking category.
